Bulgarian split squats will humble you every single time 😭 but if you want stronger glutes, toned legs, better balance, and that sculpted lower body look… you can’t skip them. One leg at a time means no cheating, no relying on your stronger side, just pure growth and stability. They burn like crazy but the results speak for themselves 🍑 Save this workout and add it to your next leg day if you’re serious about building those glutes and leveling up your physique. #bulgariansplitsquats #glutegrowth #legdayworkout #fitnessgirl #GymTok

Can you imagine what the world would be like without dentists? Any cavity or small chip in a tooth would turn into a serious problem, something you’d have to deal with using heavy forceps and tears. By the age of 30, most of us would probably be living on applesauce and soups. But thanks to dentists, orthodontists, and medical researchers, the situation has changed dramatically. Today, almost any dental issue can be treated or corrected. And what’s even more impressive - science is already getting close to growing new teeth. So yes, it’s worth simply saying: thank you to people in this profession. Because of them, we can almost not be afraid of sweets. #dentist#medicine#doctor#edit#teeth

Dumbbell Sumo Squat  Know the difference  1. Dumbbell Position Hold the dumbbell with both hands naturally hanging between your legs, rather than holding it at your chest. This allows you to lift heavier weights without being limited by arm strength. 2. Torso Posture Maintain a slight forward lean instead of staying fully upright. Leaning forward increases hip flexion, helping to stretch and better activate the glutes. 3. Stance Width and Foot Angle Set your feet about 1.5 times shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing outward at roughly a 45-degree angle. If the stance is too wide, the inner thigh muscles (adductors) will take over, reducing glute activation. 4. Load Path As you squat down, the dumbbell should not stay directly under your shoulders. Instead, it should fall slightly behind the midline, closer to your posterior chain. Bring your hands slightly inward to keep the load closer to your center of mass, which helps reduce lower back strain and improves movement efficiency. #gymtips #quads #gluteworkout #gym #gymrat

This wolf needed a good deshed today ✨ 4 hours of work in 50 seconds✂️ Double-coated dogs need grooming just as much as any other coat type. When the undercoat gets too packed, it can affect thermoregulation, skin health, and overall comfort. Moisture trapped close to the skin can lead to irritation. Regular deshedding helps prevent these issues and keeps the coat healthy and functional. Don’t wait 4–5 months. Prevention is always easier and kinder for your dog 🤍 #asmr #doggrooming #hasky #doglovers #fyp

#ad 다이어트엔 찜닭(?)  진교동찜닭의 따끈따끈한 신메뉴 4종✨ 1. 신메뉴 '찜닭떡볶이' (배민 단독 판매 중 ~6/28까지) 일반 떡볶이와는 차원이 다른 찜닭과 콜라보레이션으로 깊은 맛! 종류도 오리지널부터 불로제까지 4가지나 돼서 취향껏 고르기 좋아요. 특히 기본으로 들어간 분모자랑 치즈떡 조합이.. 정말 최고에요👍 2. 업계 최초 저당찜닭 "찜닭은 달아서 식단 관리할 때 부담스럽다?" 이제 그런 편견은 No! 맛은 그대로인데 저당으로 훨씬 부담없이 즐길 수 있어요. 교동/고추장/안동맛 3가지 중 여러분의 픽은 무엇인가요? 💰 할인 정보 6월 말까지 배달의 민족 28,000원 이상 주문 시 3,000원 할인! 오늘밤 배달 앱에서 '진교동찜닭'을 만나보세요 #진교동찜닭 #찜닭떡볶이 #저당찜닭 #신메뉴

Most people think they’re training hard. They’re not. They’re wasting energy before the real work even starts. This is the mistake 👇 People slowly climb weight after weight… doing half-effort sets the entire time. By the time they finally reach their working set? The nervous system is already fatigued. That means: 👉 Less output 👉 Less tension 👉 Less growth stimulus This is why feeder sets matter 👇 A feeder set is NOT a working set. Its job is to: • Prime the joints • Increase blood flow • Recruit muscle fibres • Wake up the nervous system Without creating unnecessary fatigue. Then when the real working set starts… Everything is ready. Maximum tension. Maximum force production. Maximum stimulus. And here’s the key 👇 If your working sets are truly hard enough… Performance should DROP after them. Less reps. Less output. Sometimes less weight. That’s fatigue accumulating in the muscle. That’s the signal for growth. If you can suddenly increase weight or reps after a “hard” set… It probably wasn’t hard enough. Train smarter. Not just longer. Follow for more no-BS hypertrophy and training strategies
